description: Cloud data platform brand mined from Snowflake's template deck.

template.name: Cover Display Title (Two-Tone)
template.description: Large two-tone display title for cover slides, with a dark primary word and a branded-blue subtitle phrase rendered as a single headline.

primary_text.description: First word or phrase rendered in near-black (#262626), bold, all-caps.

secondary_text.description: Second phrase rendered in brand blue (#105780), bold, all-caps.

font_size.description: Font size in points applied to all runs.

template.name: Cover Subtitle Line
template.description: Subtitle or descriptor line displayed beneath the main title on a cover slide, styled in muted gray Arial.

subtitle_text.default: Layouts, Icons, and Frequently Used Slides
subtitle_text.description: The subtitle or descriptor text displayed beneath the cover title.

sample_inputs.subtitle_text: Layouts, Icons, and Frequently Used Slides

template.name: Presenter / Date Byline
template.description: Small bold byline text at the bottom of a cover slide showing presenter name, title, and date.

presenter_name.description: Full name of the presenter, displayed in uppercase

presenter_title.description: Job title or role of the presenter

date.description: Presentation date string, displayed in uppercase

left_in.description: Left position of the byline text box in inches

top_in.description: Top position of the byline text box in inches

width_in.description: Width of the byline text box in inches

template.name: Copyright Footer
template.description: Thin transparent rectangle bar at the bottom of a slide containing a small grey copyright notice text.

copyright_text.description: Full copyright notice string displayed in the footer.

left_in.description: Left position of the footer bar in inches.

top_in.description: Top position of the footer bar in inches (typically near bottom of slide).

width_in.description: Width of the footer bar in inches.

template.name: Brand Logo Header
template.description: Company logo image positioned in the upper-left area of the slide for consistent branding across decks.

logo_path.description: File path or URL to the company logo image (PNG recommended)

left_in.description: Horizontal position of the logo from the left edge of the slide in inches

top_in.description: Vertical position of the logo from the top edge of the slide in inches

width_in.description: Width of the logo image in inches

height_in.description: Height of the logo image in inches

template.name: Footer Bar with Logo and Slide Number
template.description: A complete footer strip containing a brand logo image, a copyright text label, and a right-aligned slide number placeholder, positioned at the bottom of a 13.333×7.5 in slide.

copyright_text.description: Full copyright notice displayed in the footer text box.

slide_number_text.description: Slide number string to display in the right-aligned placeholder (leave empty for auto-numbering).

logo_image_base64.description: Base64-encoded PNG of the brand logo shown at the left of the footer.

template.name: Slide Title All-Caps
template.description: Large bold all-caps centered slide title at the top of the slide, matching the brand's primary heading style.

title_text.description: The slide title text (will be rendered in all-caps styling automatically).

template.name: Footer with Logo and Copyright
template.description: Bottom footer bar combining a small logo image, copyright text, and a right-aligned slide number — all positioned at the bottom of the slide.

logo_path.description: File path or URL to the small footer logo image (PNG)

copyright_text.description: Full copyright line displayed next to the logo

slide_number.description: Slide number string displayed right-aligned at far right of footer

template.name: Snowflake Clustered Bar Chart Slide
template.description: Full-slide clustered column chart with branded Snowflake colors, centered title, and footer copyright line.

slide_title.description: Main slide title displayed at the top center of the slide.

chart_title.description: Title rendered inside the chart area.

categories.description: List of category labels for the X-axis.

series_name.description: Name of the data series shown in the chart.

values.description: Numeric values for the data series, one per category.

highlight_last_bar.description: When true, the last bar is rendered in the accent blue (#29B5E8); all others use dark blue (#11577F).

copyright_year.description: Year shown in the footer copyright line.

template.name: Stacked Area Chart Slide
template.description: Full slide with a centered title and a stacked area chart using Snowflake brand colors, plus footer logo area and copyright text.

title.description: Slide title displayed above the chart in all-caps bold style.

categories.description: List of category labels for the x-axis.

series_1_name.description: Legend label for the first (light blue) series.

series_1_values.description: Numeric values for the first series.

series_2_name.description: Legend label for the second (dark blue) series.

series_2_values.description: Numeric values for the second series.

series_3_name.description: Legend label for the third (teal) series.

series_3_values.description: Numeric values for the third series.

copyright_year.description: Year shown in the footer copyright notice.

template.name: Donut Chart Slide – Left Aligned
template.description: Full slide layout with a centered title, a donut chart on the left half, and a standard Snowflake footer (logo placeholder + copyright + page number).

slide_title.description: All-caps bold title displayed at the top center of the slide.

categories.description: Slice labels for the donut chart.

values.description: Numeric values corresponding to each category slice.

series_name.description: Name of the single data series shown in the donut chart.

slice_colors.description: Hex fill colors for each donut slice, in order matching categories.

copyright_year.description: Year shown in the footer copyright notice.

template.name: Snowflake Line Chart Slide
template.description: Full-slide branded line chart with centered ALL-CAPS title, Snowflake color palette, and footer bar — suitable for multi-series trend comparisons.

slide_title.description: Slide heading displayed centered at top in ALL-CAPS bold style.

categories.description: Category labels along the X-axis (list of strings).

series_1_name.description: Legend label for the first series (light blue line).

series_1_values.description: Numeric values for the first series; must match length of categories.

series_2_name.description: Legend label for the second series (dark blue line).

series_2_values.description: Numeric values for the second series; must match length of categories.

series_3_name.description: Legend label for the third series (teal line).

series_3_values.description: Numeric values for the third series; must match length of categories.

copyright_year.description: Year shown in the footer copyright notice.

template.name: Title Cover Slide
template.description: Branded cover slide with full-bleed background image, decorative freeform shapes, logo image, large title, subtitle, and presenter/date line.

title.description: Main title text displayed prominently on the cover

presenter.description: Name of the presenter or author

date.description: Presentation date or period shown on the cover

template.name: Two-Line Title Slide
template.description: A content slide with a large bold two-line title, subtitle line, and standard footer (logo placeholder, copyright, slide number).

title_line1.default: THIS IS A MULTI-USE SLIDE WHEN YOUR
title_line1.description: First line of the two-line slide title (rendered ALL CAPS)

title_line2.default: TITLE NEEDS TO GO ON TWO LINES
title_line2.description: Second line of the two-line slide title (rendered ALL CAPS)

subtitle.default: You can add text boxes and other content anywhere on the slide without guides
subtitle.description: Subtitle or descriptor text displayed below the title

slide_number.description: Slide number shown in bottom-right footer (leave empty to omit)

sample_inputs.subtitle: Explore how modern architecture enables faster, more reliable analytics at scale

template.name: Split Graphic Text Slide
template.description: A two-column split layout with a solid color right panel, decorative freeform graphic accents, and left-side title, subtitle, and body text.

title.description: Main title text displayed on the left panel

subtitle.description: Subtitle or section label displayed below the title

body_text.description: Body paragraph text displayed on the left panel

right_panel_color.description: Hex fill color for the right background panel

accent_color.description: Hex fill color for the decorative freeform accent shapes

title_color.description: Hex color for the title text

subtitle_color.description: Hex color for the subtitle text

body_color.description: Hex color for the body text

sample_inputs.title: Transforming Data Into Insights
sample_inputs.subtitle: ANALYTICS PLATFORM
sample_inputs.body_text: Harness the power of real-time data to drive smarter decisions across your organization. Our platform integrates seamlessly with your existing workflows.
